_publications._publicationTitle: ERK inhibition rescues defects in fate specification of Nf1-deficient neural progenitors and brain abnormalities.

_contextSnippet: Nf1 hGFAP CKO mice became hunched, scruffy and exhibited growth retardation within a week...weighed only half as much as control littermates by P18
